allow: PowerShell($node = Get-Command node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($node\) { $node.Source } else { "node not found" }; $env:PATH -split ';' | Where-Object { $_ -match 'node|nvm' })

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "C:\\Program Files\\nodejs" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name; Get-ChildItem "$env:APPDATA\\npm" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name; Get-ChildItem "$env:ProgramFiles\\nodejs" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue -Filter "node.exe" | Select-Object FullName; $env:PATH)

PowerShell($cmds = @\('bun', 'deno', 'pnpm', 'yarn'\); foreach \($c in $cmds\) { $r = Get-Command $c -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($r\) { "$c found at $\($r.Source\)" } else { "$c not found" } })

PowerShell($py = Get-Command python -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($py\) { $py.Source; python --version } else { $p3 = Get-Command python3 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($p3\) { $p3.Source; python3 --version } else { "Python not found" } })
